caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, over-ear headphones, and a dark green t-shirt with the white text "ION NEVER DO SHIT" is speaking into a professional microphone. He is situated in a room that appears to be a clothing store or studio, with walls covered in framed photographs and a clothing rack with various garments in the background. To his left, a white mannequin wears a white t-shirt. A circular logo with the text "THE" is visible on the left side of the screen, and a red logo reading "BOUT REALLY TOT" is on the right. Across the frames, the man's facial expression shifts as he speaks, his mouth opening and closing while his gaze remains mostly focused forward. The background setting, including the equipment and decor, remains static throughout the sequence.
